issues.sample: MY MOTORCYCLE HAD A TICKING SOUND COMING FROM THE GEARBOX. THE DEALER DECIDED IT WAS NOT SAFE TO RIDE THE BIKE, THAT I SHOULD LEAVE IT UNTIL BMW COMES WITH A SOLUTION. I CURRENTLY HAVE A 2019 K1600 GTL SITTING IN SERVICE WITHOUT ANY RESOLUTION. THE BIKE IS WITH EUROCYCLES OF DAYT

narrative.headline: What 2019 Bmw K 1600 Gtl owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (100% of reports).
